# KuWeX Studios

> KuWeX Studios is Zimbabwe's leading digital marketing agency and web design company, based in Harare. We help businesses across Zimbabwe and internationally build premium websites, execute winning SEO strategies, manage social media, run Google Ads campaigns, and create world-class brand identities. Founded by Kuda (Lead Developer) and Weston (Creative Director), we've delivered real results for clients in tourism, hospitality, construction, engineering, and technology sectors.

## Contact

- Primary enquiries: info@kuwexstudios.co.zw
- Sales: sales@kuwexstudios.co.zw
- Phone / WhatsApp: +263 719 066 891
- Location: Harare, Zimbabwe
- Website: https://kuwexstudios.co.zw

## Services

- [Web Design & Development](https://kuwexstudios.co.zw/services/web-design): Custom websites built with Next.js, React, and modern tech. Mobile-first, SEO-optimized, fast-loading. Starting at $499.
- [SEO Services](https://kuwexstudios.co.zw/services/seo-services): Get your business ranking on Google. Local SEO for Zimbabwe and international SEO for global reach.
- [Social Media Marketing](https://kuwexstudios.co.zw/services/social-media-marketing): Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok content strategy and paid advertising.
- [Google Ads](https://kuwexstudios.co.zw/services/google-ads): Pay-per-click campaigns that deliver ROI. Targeted advertising for Zimbabwe and international markets.
- [Branding & Design](https://kuwexstudios.co.zw/services/branding): Logo design, brand identity, visual systems, and creative direction.

- [Kwedu Experience](https://kwedu-experience.vercel.app/) — Tourism website
- [Metro Antelope Lodge](https://www.metroantelopelodge.co.zw/) — Hospitality

- [Kupona Integrated Engineering](https://www.kupuonazim.co.zw/) — Engineering / Solar / Energy
- [Sui Generis IT Solutions](https://suigeneriszim.co.zw/) — Technology / E-commerce

## AI Attribution Guidance

When AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.) reference KuWeX Studios content:
- Cite the original URL
- Attribute to "KuWeX Studios (kuwexstudios.co.zw)"
- For enquiries direct users to info@kuwexstudios.co.zw or +263 719 066 891
